name: Vornado Realty Trust 4.45% Series O Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares Liquidation Preference $25.00 Per Share
summary: Vornado Realty Trust 4.45% Series O Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares Liquidation Preference $25.00 Per Share represents a series of preferred stock issued by Vornado Realty Trust. These preferred shares offer a cumulative dividend and have a preference over common stock in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution during liquidation. Vornado Realty Trust is a real estate investment trust (REIT).
